MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND FILED BY DEFENDANT NORIEGA, ROGELIO HEARING SET FOR AUG-18-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT NORIEGA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND TO VACATE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 473(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRY AND FRANCES GAGE LP

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROGELIO NORIEGA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND TO VACATE JUDGMENT (CCP 473 (B)IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE REQUEST TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473 IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. CCP SEC. 473(B) PROVIDES THAT SUCH A MOTION MUST BE MADE WITHIN SIX MONTHS AFTER THE ENTRY OF DEFAULT. THE DEFAULT WAS ENTERED ON NOVEMBER 20, 2013. DEFENDANT DID NOT FILE HIS MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT UNTIL JULY 9, 2014, BEYOND THE SIX MONTH PERIOD. FURTHER, DEFENDANT DID NOT ATTACH A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING TO HIS MOTION, AS REQUIRED BY CCP SEC. 473(B). THE REQUEST TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED JUNE 17, 2014 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CCP 473(A)(1) IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To Local Rule 6.5
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Joseph A. Lepera, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, HENRY AND FRANCES GAGE LP.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ROGELIO NORIEGA. Monica Castillo, Esq., attorney for Rogelio Noriega present in court.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Benjamin Gage and George Gace sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
Also present in court Defendant Rogelio Noriega sworn and examinde through Certified Spanish Interpreter Irene R. Tenney.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $27,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $524.65
Total Judgment in the amount of $28,024.65
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Continued To Apr-08-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Continued To Feb-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ROGELIO NORIEGA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND TO VACATE JUDGMENT (CCP 473 (b)is Granted in part and denied in part. The request to set aside the default pursuant to CCP section 473 is denied as untimely. CCP sec. 473(b) provides that such a motion must be made within six months after the entry of default. The default was entered on November 20, 2013. Defendant did not file his motion to set aside the default until July 9, 2014, beyond the six month period. Further, Defendant did not attach a proposed responsive pleading to his motion, as required by CCP sec. 473(b). The request to set aside the default judgment entered June 17, 2014 is granted. Plaintiff's request for attorneys fees and costs pursuant to CCP 473(a)(1) is denied. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
